{{Infobox character
| name = Cryce
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Cryce]]'s energy faded and she blinked back tears.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Cryce]] is a doctor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Cryce]] and her team prepare a drone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Cryce]] is a character who aggressively slid over to shove [[Mell]] aside.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
